name: search_documents
description: Perform a full-text search against a Meilisearch index. Returns ranked results with typo tolerance, highlighting, facet distribution, and pagination. Supports filtering by attributes, sorting, and geo-distance. Processing times are typically under 50ms.

parameters.name: indexUid
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the index to search.

parameters.name: filter
parameters.description: Filter expression using attribute operators (e.g. 'genres = action AND rating > 4').

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Array of attributes to sort by with direction (e.g. ['rating:desc', 'title:asc']).

parameters.name: facets
parameters.description: List of attributes to compute facet distributions for.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return (default 20).

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of results to skip for pagination (default 0).

parameters.name: attributesToRetrieve
parameters.description: Attributes to include in each result. Defaults to all.

parameters.name: attributesToHighlight
parameters.description: Attributes where matching text should be highlighted with <em> tags.

parameters.name: showRankingScore
parameters.description: If true, includes the relevance score for each result.

hits.title: American Ninja
hits.overview: An American soldier discovers he has ninja skills...
